title: Raa Raa The Noisy Lion Personalised Applique Super Soft Fleece Blanket (Baby Blue) - CHOICE OF 5 COLOURS NOW AVAILABLE AT CUSTOMISATION POINT!
features: VERY EASY TO PERSONALISE - CLICK ON THE CUSTOMISE NOW BUTTON AT CHECKOUT then add the personalisation details required on your blanket.

IMPORTANT NOTE: If you select NAME ONLY and then request extra text to be added below the design – THIS WILL NOT BE EMBROIDERED. To have up to 2 additional lines of text embroidered below the design in addition to the name above the design you need to select PLUS TEXT BELOW DESIGN when customising your blanket.

Position of Embroidery: Embroidered at the bottom centre of the blanket unless you request it to be embroidered elsewhere. The embroidered design assuming you require 3 lines of text measures approx. 20cm x 30cm but will be slightly smaller if you require less text.

Our luxury personalised appliqued blankets are made of 100% super soft fleece material which keeps baby lovely and warm and makes a wonderful keepsake. Our blankets measure approx. 100 cm x 72 cm and are machine washable up to 30 degrees and will retain their shape.
They make ideal gifts to celebrate occasions such as the birth of a baby, Birthday, Christening, Naming Day, Baptism, Christmas Present or just as a cosy blanket.
description: Our luxury personalised appliqued super soft fleece blankets have been individually handmade by us in the UK and are embroidered with the details of your choice. They make perfect gifts and will be treasured for years to come.
